misc: Appreciates the thoughtful course designs of Kosti Kuronen who passed away in 2024
biography: Ofri, a familiar face from Golf Pirkkala, hails from Tampere, Finland. With a thoughtful demeanor both on and off the course, Ofri is known for his composed style.
He greatly appreciates the course designs of the late Kosti Kuronen. Kosti passed away in 2024 and is sorely missed by those who appreciate a thoughtful course design.

Ofri has participated in the Hector Trophée on three prior occasions. Hector Trophée 2026 will mark Ofri's fourth appearance in the tournament. While victory has eluded him thus far, Ofri's consistent presence underscores his dedication to the sport and the unique challenges presented by the Trophée.
